{"first-name":"Sanja ","last-name":"Klement","email":"saklement@outlook.de","phone":"+49 1794239643","query-type":"project-query","message":"I’m currently conducting a University of Queensland–approved research study on the workplace experiences of employees aged 55+ in Australia. The project explores how workplace environments influence wellbeing among older workers and potential support mechanisms. I’m reaching out to ask whether you might be able to share a short 10–12 minute survey with your networks. I’d be very happy to provide a ready-to-share blurb and any supporting materials. Many thanks for considering this request. "}

For instance in PUASAR022 element 3.5 & 4.3 are exactly the same. Are these likely to be updated when the training package is next under review? Thanks, Dee"}

How does this interact with prerequisite rules? Are we required to grant credit transfer regardless, or must prerequisites be satisfied first?\nAny advice is appreciated."}

Many Thanks"}

- Whether online self paced delivery is available for this course
- What the process and timeline would look like

Thank you."}

I am reaching out to introduce Arcadia Social Research and to explore opportunities to support your workforce and skills research priorities.\n\nArcadia recently completed a national qualitative workforce mobility study for BuildSkills Australia, examining how and why workers transition into the residential construction sector. {"first-name":"Randy Joe ","last-name":"Pakoa","email":"jrandy.pakoa@gmail.com","phone":"6787185992","query-type":"other","message":"I am writing from the Vanuatu Police Training College.  Just for infor, we are developing a new Diploma Qualification - Diploma of Public Safety (Policing). It is required by our Qualification Authority (VQA) that it is benchmarked against a similar qualification from the Pacific in order to complete the accreditation process. We have identified the Australian Diploma of Policing POL54120 as a suitable qualification that we can benchmark against.  But we will require a few qualification details "}

{"first-name":"Merveil","last-name":"Nkongolo","email":"mpsecurity@secqld.com.au","phone":"0451097416","query-type":"training-product-development","message":"Hello, my name is Merveil Nkongolo. I'm building a school-based Security & public safety pathway program and looking to partner with an RTO for delivery and compliance. I'll be bringing schools and student cohorts. I'm keen to explore a partnership where you handle accreditation and we handle delivery and growth. "}

{"first-name":"Dan","last-name":"Hill","email":"dan@spectraining.edu.au","phone":"0404459367","query-type":"Workforce Planning","message":"Good afternoon,

Would it be possible to arrange a meeting regarding trainer retention and acquisition strategies with the appropriate person/people at PSA?

I’m the co-founder and director of one of Australia’s longest running TAE providers, SpecTraining RTO 31971, and we’ve been working with RTOs on this subject for some time, but a recent discussion with the team from Velg highlighted the need from a JSC standpoint. 

I sincerely appreciate any assistance and direction you can provide. "}

{"first-name":"Janusz (Jay)","last-name":"Miedlar","email":"Janusz.Miedlar@correctiveservices.nsw.gov.au","phone":"0436122172","query-type":"training-product-development","message":"Dear Public Skills Australia support team,

I am seeking clarification on circumstances where a training package continues to include a superseded unit of competency within a qualification.

Given PSA ’s role as the developer of the relevant training package, could you please clarify PSA position on this matter? - are RTOs expected to continue delivering a superseded unit until the training package itself is updated, despite the unit having been superseded on training.gov.au?

Kind regards
Jay"}
